## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run eval:game`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`

## Game Harness Checklist

- [ ] Game-rule changes have pure-function tests.
- [ ] Level changes have solvability or expected-failure coverage.
- [ ] Browser behavior was verified with Playwright.
- [ ] Visual changes include a screenshot or browser artifact when relevant.
- [ ] `PLAN.md`, `.logs/`, or `.prompts/` were updated when the change affects game direction, iteration history, or assets.
